Usage: db-truncater --db PATH 
                    (--truncate-after-slot SLOT_NUMBER | 
                      --truncate-after-block BLOCK_NUMBER) [--verbose]
                    --config PATH [--threshold THRESHOLD]

  Utility for truncating an ImmutableDB

Available options:
  --db PATH                Path of the chain DB
  --truncate-after-slot SLOT_NUMBER
                           Remove all blocks with a higher slot number
  --truncate-after-block BLOCK_NUMBER
                           The block number of the intended new tip of the chain
                           after truncation
  --verbose                Enable verbose logging
  --config PATH            Path to config file
  --threshold THRESHOLD    PBftSignatureThreshold
  -h,--help                Show this help text
